Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Territory]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — A Territory can answer a mental call.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — A Territory is a power that a Traveler summons from somewhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — The characters are currently in a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — A Territory is a place accessible through a Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — A Territory can be a house that contains an entire world within its walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Time flows differently in each Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Each Territory has its own rules and restrictions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — A Territory is a place where magical things are supposed to happen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — In a Territory, normal physical laws barely hold sway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — Cool breath and liquid steel grant Simon the power of a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Simon has a Territory containing a Damascan family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — A Traveler can call upon their Territory using a pattern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — A moon-lit wasteland may be someone's Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Alin uses the borrowed power of his Territory to reinforce a shield.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kai can reach through his sword to his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Territories encompass all the powers of nature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Simon was in his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Simon can draw strength and speed from his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — The frozen horn does not work in a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — The glass bell banishes things back to their Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Naraka Travelers may learn to stay cool in their Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — A Territory is a type of location or domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — The presence of the Territory helps keep the Incarnation in check.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — A Territory provides supernatural vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Alin can send energy directly to his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Ilana recognizes a Territory when she falls into one.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Incarnations existing within Territories can advance their own goals at the expense of foreign Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Indirial was sealed into the Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon is in debt to his Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — A chain binds Simon to his Territory.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
